# Nrth AI

> Nrth AI builds the Nrth Agentic OS — a secure, on-premise AI runtime that connects enterprise workflows, AI models, agents, and skills into one accountable layer. We also ship paid early-access deployments that put the OS into production today.

Nrth AI is a pre-seed AI product startup based in Bergen, Norway (est. 2026). We are building the next-generation infrastructure for enterprise AI agents, and we take on pilot customers to deploy, train, and stress-test the OS in production.

## Product — the Nrth Agentic OS

A native AI Agentic OS: a secure runtime that turns models, agents, and real business workflows into one governed system — observable, permissioned, and accountable for every action it takes.

- Runs on any hardware, on-premise — your data never leaves the network.
- Setup → Workflows → Agents → Skills: four layers, one accountable system.
- Security-first: permissioned tool access, full audit logs, evals, guardrails, human-in-the-loop.
- In active development. Pilot customers get early access via custom deployments.

See: https://nrth.no/product

## Outcomes in production (Work)

Representative outcomes from agents running on the OS:

- **Customer support agents** — ~72% of tier-1 tickets auto-resolved; the rest escalated with full context.
- **Sales-outreach agents** — ~5× SDR throughput; personalized first-touch at scale.
- **Back-office automation agents** — invoice matching, vendor comms, compliance, reconciliation; zero added headcount.
- Plus research, internal-knowledge, and voice/phone agents.

See: https://nrth.no/work

## Services — early access to the OS

Four engagements, with pricing and delivery timelines included:

- **AI Employees** — an agent running on the OS that replaces or augments a role. Setup from ~$5,000; monthly ops from $500. Delivery 1–3 weeks.
- **On-Premise AI Infrastructure** — the platform/infrastructure the OS runs on, on your own hardware. Typically $10,000–$100,000+. Delivery 2–4 weeks.
- **Custom AI Development** — custom builds on the OS. Small from ~$15,000; mid-size from $40,000; enterprise from $100,000+. Delivery 4–16 weeks.
- **AI Strategy & Advisory** — OS-adoption advisory. Readiness assessments from $3,500; strategy sprints from $7,500; executive retainers from $2,500/month. Delivery 1–2 weeks.

See: https://nrth.no/services

## Company

Pre-seed, Bergen, Norway, est. 2026. Two founders: Thomas Uthaug (business, product & delivery) and Simen Uthaug (technical & developer). We take on pilot customers to train and stress-test the OS. Investor presentation: https://nrth.no/investors

## Contact

- Email: contact@nrth.no
- Website: https://nrth.no
- Location: Bergen, Norway
- Send a brief: https://nrth.no/contact — a human responds within 1 business day.

## For AI agents

- Action manifest: /.well-known/ai-plugin.json
- Agent card: /agent.json
- OpenAPI: /openapi.json
- Structured data: JSON-LD embedded in pages (Organization, Service, SoftwareApplication, FAQPage, ContactPoint)
- Machine-readable sitemap: /sitemap.xml
- Crawl policy: /robots.txt (AI crawlers explicitly allowed)

Stable API contracts (unchanged):

- `POST /api/inquiry` — submit a discovery brief
- `POST /api/book` — book a 30-minute intro call
- `POST /api/chat` — talk to the Nrth AI sales agent
- `GET /api/services` — list the service catalog

Every page is static HTML that requires no JavaScript to read, so any agent can read and act on this site without rendering JS.
